gmap.description: [Traduction en cours] This declares a ~m:Google Map~ variable. See ~l:create~.

crée/cree.description:
[Traduction en cours] 1. Creates a new ~l:gmap!Google Map~ in the specified ~l:div|k|browser~.

2. Creates a new ~l:marker~ in the specified ~l:gmap!Google Map~.
crée/cree.examples:
crée/cree Map dans MapContainer
create Marker dans Map

marqueur.description: [Traduction en cours] This declares a ~m:marker~ variable. See ~l:create~.%0a%0aA ~m:marker~ is a map pin. You can specify the color of the pin and its title using ~l:set~.

sur.description: [Traduction en cours] Handles events of various kinds arising from ~l:gmap!Google Maps~ and ~l:marker!markers~.%0a%0a~m:click~ : a click in the map or marker%0a%0a~m:move~ : the map was moved by the user%0a%0a~m:type~ : the map type was changed, e.g. roadmap or satellite%0a%0a~m:zoom~ : the zoom level was changed by the user%0a
sur.examples: sur zoom Map va à/a MapUpdate%0asur clic Marker va à/a ShowInfo

supprime/retire.description: [Traduction en cours] Removes all the ~l:marker!markers~ from the ~l:gmap!Google Map~.

définis/definis.syntax: définis/definis [le/la/les/l] clé/cle/touche de {gmap} à/a {value}%0adéfinis/definis [le/la/les/l] latitude/longitude/zoom/type de {gmap} à/a {value}%0adéfinis/definis [le/la/les/l] titre de {marker} à/a {value}%0adéfinis/definis [le/la/les/l] label de {marker} à/a {value}%0adéfinis/definis [le/la/les/l] position de {marker} à/a {value}%0adéfinis/definis [le/la/les/l] couleur de {marker} à/a {value}
définis/definis.description: [Traduction en cours] Sets various attributes of ~l:gmap!Google Maps~ and ~l:marker!markers~.%0a%0a~m:sets the key~ is needed for maps to work at all. API Keys are issued by Google and permit a large allowance of free usage per day before any charges apply. If possible, do not include the key directly in your script as others could then make free use of it. Instead, put it on your server and get it using a REST endpoint. Alternatively, go to your Google Developer Console and specify which URLs should be associated with the key, making it unusable anywhere else.%0a%0aThe ~m:position~ of a ~l:marker~ is a JSON string containing latitude and longitude properties, as for example:%0a%0a~m:{~dq~latitude~dq~:~dq~53.8291119~dq~,~dq~longitude~dq~:~dq~-1.5381586~dq~}~
définis/definis.examples: définis/definis le/la/les/l clé/cle/touche de Map à/a APIKey%0adéfinis/definis le/la/les/l latitude de Map à/a `44.277691`%0adéfinis/definis le/la/les/l longitude de Map à/a `-0.78228`%0adéfinis/definis le/la/les/l zoom de Map à/a `14.2`%0adéfinis/definis le/la/les/l type de Map à/a `roadmap`%0adéfinis/definis le/la/les/l titre de Marker à/a `Post Office`%0adéfinis/definis le/la/les/l label de Marker à/a `O`%0adéfinis/definis le/la/les/l position de Marker à/a CurrentPosition%0adéfinis/definis le/la/les/l couleur de {marker} à/a `#ff0`

montre.description: [Traduction en cours] Shows a ~l:gmap!Google Map~, that is, makes it visible. Called after ~l:create~.

actualise.description: [Traduction en cours] Updates a ~l:gmap!Google Map~ after changes have been made by the script that affect how it should be displayed.

clic position.syntax: [le/la/les/l] clic position de {gmap}%0a[le/la/les/l] latitude/longitude/zoom/type/limites de {gmap}%0a[le/la/les/l] latitude/longitude/titre de {marker}
clic position.description: [Traduction en cours] 1. Gets the position where the user clicked the map. This is a JSON value that holds both latitude and longitude. It can be fed directly into ~l:set|k!set the position of {gmap}~.%0a%0a2. Gets the latitude, longitude, zoom, type or bounds of a ~l:gmap|k!Google Map~. ~m:bounds~ is a JSON value with properties ~m:north~, ~m:south~, ~m:east~ and ~m:west~. The website [Here On The Map](https://hereonthemap.com) uses these to search its database for markers located within the bounds of the map.%0a%0a3. Gets an attribute of a ~l:marker~.
clic position.examples: mets le/la/les/l clic position de Map dans Position%0amets le/la/les/l bound de Map dans Bounds%0amets le/la/les/l titre de Marker dans PinName

latitude.description: [Traduction en cours] Gets the latitude of the center of a ~l:gmap|k!Google Map~ or the position of a ~l:marker|k~.
latitude.examples: mets le/la/les/l latitude de Map dans MapLat%0amets le/la/les/l latitude de Marker dans MarkerLatitude

longitude.description: [Traduction en cours] Gets the longitude of the center of a ~l:gmap|k!Google Map~ or the position of a ~l:marker|k~.
longitude.examples: mets le/la/les/l longitude de Map dans MapLng%0amets le/la/les/l longitude de Marker dans MarkerLongitude

type.description: [Traduction en cours] Gets the type (~m:roadmap~ or ~m:satellite~) of a ~l:gmap|k!Google Map~.
type.examples: mets le/la/les/l type de Map dans MapType

titre.description: [Traduction en cours] Gets the title of a ~l:marker|k~.
titre.examples: mets le/la/les/l titre de Marker dans Title

limites.description: [Traduction en cours] Gets the bounds of a ~l:gmap|k!Google Map~. ~m:bounds~ is a JSON value with properties ~m:north~, ~m:south~, ~m:east~ and ~m:west~. The website [Here On The Map](https://hereonthemap.com) uses these to search its database for markers located within the bounds of the map. See ~l:on|k!on click~ and ~l:click position!the click position~.%0a
limites.examples: mets le/la/les/l limites de Map dans Bounds

zoom.description: [Traduction en cours] Gets the current zoom level for the ~l:gmap|k!Google Map~.
zoom.examples: mets le/la/les/l zoom de Map dans Zoom

gmap.description: [Traduction en cours] Defines a map variable. See also ~l:create~.

marqueur.description: [Traduction en cours] Defines a marker - a pin on the map. See also ~l:gmap~ and ~l:create~

crée/cree.description: [Traduction en cours] Creates a map or a marker. See ~l:gmap~ and ~l:marker~.
crée/cree.examples: crée/cree MyMap dans MapDiv%0acrée/cree Marker dans MyMap

sur.description: [Traduction en cours] Handle an event arising in a map or a marker.%0aA click event occurs when the user clicks the map or a marker on the map.%0aA move event occurs when the map is dragged.%0aA type event occurs when the type of the map is changed, e.g. from roadmap to satellite.%0aA zoom event occurs when the user zooms in or out of the map.%0a%0aSee ~l:gmap~, ~l:marker~ and ~l:set~.
sur.examples: sur clic MyMap goto ...%0asur clic Marker goto ...%0asur déplace/deplace MyMap goto ...%0asur type MyMap goto ...%0asur zoom MyMap goto ...

supprime/retire.description: [Traduction en cours] This removes all markers from the map. See also ~l:map~, ~l:marker~ and ~l:create~.

définis/definis.syntax: définis/definis [le/la/les/l] clé/cle/touche/latitude/longitude/type/zoom de {map} à/a {value}%0adéfinis/definis le/la/les/l titre/position/couleur de {marker} à/a {value}
définis/definis.description: [Traduction en cours] Sets an attribute of a ~l:map~ or of a ~l:marker~. Map attributes are key, latitude, longitude, type and zoom; marker attributes are title, position and color.%0a%0aThe ~sq~key~sq~ of a map is a code supplied by Google that authorizes use of the map on any given website. A key may apply to all websites or just to specific ones. Visit the Google Developer Console to request a key. You will need a Google account to do this but there are no costs until the usage of your maps becomes quite large.%0a%0aLatitude and longitude are that of the center of a map.%0a%0aThe Type of a map is as defined by Google, e.g. ~sq~roadmap~sq~ or ~sq~satellite~sq~.%0a%0aThe Zoom of a map is a decimal value that ranges from very wide angle (0) through to fully zoomed in (2 or 22).%0a%0aThe Title of a marker is displayed when the mouse hovers over it. (on a PC, of course; on a mobile there is no hover).%0a%0aThe Position of a marker is a JSON string containing 2 decimal properties; latitude and longitude. For example:%0a%0a{~dq~latitude~dq~:~dq~`53.8291119`~dq~,~dq~longitude~dq~:~dq~-1.5381586~dq~}%0a%0aThe Color of a marker is a standard CSS color e.g. `pink` or `#ff63a9`.%0a%0aSee also ~l:map~ and ~l:marker~.
définis/definis.examples: définis/definis le/la/les/l clé/cle/touche de MyMap à/a `YOUR_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY`%0adéfinis/definis le/la/les/l latitude de MyMap à/a `53.8291119`%0adéfinis/definis le/la/les/l longitude de MyMap to`-1.5381586`%0adéfinis/definis le/la/les/l zoom de MyMap à/a `17.0`%0adéfinis/definis le/la/les/l titre de Marker à/a `Central Library`%0adéfinis/definis le/la/les/l position de Marker à/a Position%0adéfinis/definis le/la/les/l couleur de Marker à/a `#c5e`

montre.description: [Traduction en cours] Make the newly-created map visible. See also ~l:map~ and ~l:create~.
